<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Policies;

use Koine\Sales\Events\ChargeCaptured;

/**
 * Policy seam: when ChargeCaptured occurs, the intended reaction is
 * Books::record(amount: $event->capturedAmount). Koine does not generate the cross-aggregate call
 * (no imperative logic in the model); implement react() to wire it.
 */
interface PostToLedgerPolicy
{
    /** React to a ChargeCaptured event. Intended reaction: Books::record(amount: $event->capturedAmount). */
    public function react(ChargeCaptured $event): void;
}
